messages.message:
Hi! Thanks for reaching out 
To make sure I point you to the right Pilates Reformer, could you tell me a bit about your plan?
 Is this for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 Roughly how many units are you considering?
 Which country will the machines be delivered to?

To make it easier, would you like to start from the logo side or the color/style side first?
Once I know that, I can show you the most suitable direction for your studio.

Hi Hemanth, just following up on your studio project.
For a 15-unit setup, we can usually support customization like logo branding, frame color, and upholstery color.
